$meta.description: Corner radius scale. Radius never conveys meaning or state.

radius.none.description: Corner radius none. Radius is decorative and never conveys state.

radius.full.description: Fully rounded corner for pills, avatars and circular icon buttons. Synonym of radius.pill; components may name either. Radius is decorative and never conveys state.
